title: On Time
writer: Alfred A. Cohn, Garrett Fort, Ralph Spence
actors: Richard Talmadge, Billie Dove, Stuart Holmes
plot: Harry Willis returns to Helen Hendon discouraged by his failure to make a fortune in 6 months as he promised. Accepting a job that will pay him $10,000 for following instructions for a day, Harry soon finds himself in a series of ...
